name: FOG - Fear Of Going
short_description: Your new action-RPG addiction. Battle through the circles levels of hell in a psychedelic watercolor painted world. Unleash your creativity to create a character build that will take you all the way to the gates of heaven.
detailed_description: F.O.G (also known as FOG) brings classic action-RPG game mechanics to a third-person camera and dynamic movement. Battle through the nine circles of hell in a psychedelic watercolor painted world. Unleash your creativity to create a character build that will take you all the way to the gates of heaven, alone or with friends. Pick five of twenty weapon types and pick one of seven damage types. When you die, come back stronger with the gear and experience points you earn. There are always new character builds to try and gear to optimize including new content and frequent updates! Massively online server is located in Washington, US for online p.v.p and co-op. Internet connection not required.
